allow: Bash(RL_AUTORUN_STAGE=3 RL_AUTORUN_CHECKPOINT=best python rl_autorun.py --submit ae tune-001-baseline-stage3-best)
Bash(RL_AUTORUN_STAGE=3 RL_AUTORUN_CHECKPOINT=best RL_AUTORUN_TARGET=ae/models/ppo.pt python rl_autorun.py --submit ae tune-001b-baseline-fix)

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date "2026-05-24 16:40:00"\)} | ForEach-Object { $p = $_; try { $cmd = \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($p.Id\)"\).CommandLine; "$\($p.Id\) [$\($p.StartTime\)] $cmd" } catch { "$\($p.Id\) [$\($p.StartTime\)] \(cmd unavail\)" } })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 43736, 18508, 22212 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Id -in @\(43736, 18508, 22212\)} | Select-Object Id, HasExited)

systemPrompt: Always give clear and concise responses. No unnecessary padding or repetition. Get to the point. Always ask for confirmation before executing console/shell commands.
